messages: Now let me explore the existing config, routes, and constants to understand what currently exists.

Now I have full context. Let me implement the schema-dev deliverables.  **Intent: The product-quick-view feature is a modal overlay on existing PLP pages. It requires NO new routes and NO config changes. My deliverable is shared constants (test IDs, modal configuration) that serve as a data contract between the storefront-dev (components/tests) and live-ui (E2E) agents.**
Now let me validate the constants file parses correctly and doesn't break the existing module interface:
Now let me verify the config file is still valid and check the routes file for any needed changes:
Good. Config is untouched and valid. Let me verify the final state of the constants file:
Now let me do a syntax check using the roam tool on the modified file:
Roam tools are blocked by the security policy. Falling back to standard tools. Let me verify the diff and commit:
